title: WeBuild – Control Attestation (Control) – SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of a Control attestation as defined in the Control Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing. The Control attestation records all natural and legal persons exercising direct or indirect control over a legal entity, providing comprehensive transparency on control structures and governance mechanisms in support of KYC/KYS processes and AML obligations.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type. Base type is 'eu.we-build.control.1'.

iss.description: Identifier of the entity that issued the attestation (URI or DID). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable. Per RFC 7519.

iat.description: Issuance date and time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable. Per RFC 7519.

exp.description: Expiry date and time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable. Per RFC 7519.

attestation_legal_category.description: The legal category of the attestation as defined by eIDAS 2. For Control attestations this SHALL be 'EAA', as the attestation is typically self-issued by the legal entity subject to the control disclosure.

issuing_entity.description: The identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation. For Control attestations this is typically the subject entity itself (self-issued EAA).

controller.description: Array of controller objects (either natural person or legal person). SHALL contain at least one natural person controller to comply with AML requirements that mandate identification of natural persons who ultimately control the entity.

items.description: A single controller entry. The 'type' field identifies whether the controller is a natural person (NP) or a legal entity (LE). Each controller entry includes identity attributes, address, and at least one control record.

type.description: Indicates whether the controller is a natural person (NP) or a legal entity (LE). SHALL be non-empty.

natural_person.description: Details of a natural person controller. Required when type is 'NP'.

first_name.description: First name(s), including middle name(s) where applicable, of the natural person who exercises control. SHALL be a non-empty string.

surname.description: Last name(s) or surname(s) of the natural person who exercises control. SHALL be a non-empty string.

date_of_birth.description: Day, month, and year of birth of the natural person controller. SHALL follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

legal_person.description: Details of a legal person (entity) controller. Required when type is 'LE'.

legal_name.description: The complete official name of the legal entity which exercises control in the subject entity. SHALL be a non-empty string.

legal_form.description: The legal form of the controlling legal entity (e.g., GmbH, AG, Ltd, SA, BV). SHALL be a non-empty string.

identifier.description: The identification of the legal entity which controls this entity. At least one identifier (euid, lei, or tax) must be specified.

euid.description: European Unique Identifier (EUID) per ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. Optional.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) per ISO 17442. Optional.

tax.description: Tax Number or national company registration number. Optional.

address.description: Address of the controller. For natural persons this is the residence address; for legal persons this is the registered address. All sub-fields are mandatory per the Rulebook data model.

street.description: Street name of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

house_number.description: House or building number of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

locality.description: City or locality of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

region.description: State, province, or region of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

postal_code.description: Postal or ZIP code of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

control.description: Array of control records for this controller. At least one control record SHALL be present per controller entry.

items.description: A single control record describing the control interest exercised by this controller over a legal entity.

legal_identifier.description: The identifier of the controlled entity (e.g., EUID, LEI, or national registration number). SHALL be non-empty.

type.description: Type of control exercised. SHALL use one of the standardized values: 'direct' (control exercised without intermediaries) or 'indirect' (control exercised through one or more intermediate entities or contractual arrangements).

voting_rights.description: The percentage of voting rights held by this controller (0–100), or null where voting rights are not applicable (e.g., control exercised purely through contractual or nominee arrangements).

oneOf.description: Percentage of voting rights as a decimal value between 0.00 and 100.00 (inclusive).
Null where voting rights are not applicable for this control relationship.

mechanism.description: The mechanism(s) through which control is exercised. SHALL contain at least one value from the standardized list defined in Section 2.8.1 of the Control Rulebook. Multiple mechanisms MAY apply simultaneously.

evidence.description: List of supporting documentation substantiating the control structure (e.g., governance chart, shareholder agreement, articles of association, trust deed). At least one piece of evidence SHALL be present. Evidence MAY be provided as a URI reference or as an embedded base64-encoded document.

items.description: A single piece of supporting evidence for the control structure.

evidence_id.description: URI reference to the evidence document (e.g., governance chart, shareholder agreement, articles of association). If the Relying Party requires additional information regarding the control structure, it may download the relevant document and use it as supporting evidence. SHALL be a non-empty string.

evidence_type.description: Defines the type of the object, which SHALL be 'Evidence'.

evidence_data.description: The actual control structure document as a base64-encoded string. This field is required if the 'evidence_id' does not contain a URI to an existing publicly accessible location. Optional.

evidence_confirmation.description: Boolean confirmation that the control structure document is current and has been used as the basis for the control calculation. Optional.

evidence_date.description: The date when the evidence document was created or last updated. SHALL follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when the technical validity period is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For Control attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the Control attestation can be found or looked up. Optional.

schema_version.description: Version of the Control attestation schema used. Optional.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.
